title: oxypetalum decaisneanum
intro: Oxypetalum decaisneanum, also known as the night-blooming oxypetalum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, native to Mexico and Central America. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, and is believed to have various health benefits such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and relieving respiratory issues. Oxypetalum decaisneanum is often prepared as a tea or infusion for its health benefits, and its leaves can also be used to make a poultice to treat skin conditions. Additionally, the plant's roots are sometimes used in herbal preparations to treat digestive issues and promote overall well-being.
